name: @factorialco/f0compose
description: Self-contained Vite app where designers and PMs prototype Factorial screens with AI, constrained to f0 components.

scripts.predev: pnpm run generate:manifest && tsx scripts/ensure-f0-react-fresh.ts && tsx scripts/install-skills.ts
scripts.prestart: pnpm run generate:manifest && tsx scripts/ensure-f0-react-fresh.ts && tsx scripts/install-skills.ts
scripts.prebuild: pnpm run generate:manifest && tsx scripts/ensure-f0-react-fresh.ts && tsx scripts/install-skills.ts
scripts.skills:install: npx -y skills add pbakaus/impeccable -y && tsx scripts/install-skills.ts
scripts.share: vercel pull --yes --environment=production && vercel build --prod && vercel deploy --prebuilt --prod
